_publications._publicationTitle: Exploring transcriptional regulators Ref-1 and STAT3 as therapeutic targets in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumours.

_contextSnippet: The PDX tumour retained positivity for Ref-1, p-STAT3 and PGP9.5 and retained lack of expression of S100 and CD56
details: Retained positivity for Ref-1, p-STAT3 and PGP9.5 and retained lack of expression of S100 and CD56, confirming retention of key IHC markers from original tumor
